summary: Comprehensive testing of Approvals page filters and Withdrawal approval features. All 10 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working including filters, withdrawal approval dialog with source account + screenshot, USDT in currencies, and saved bank accounts dropdown.
passed_tests: Backend: Client bank accounts CRUD (create and retrieve)
Backend: Withdrawal approval requires source_account_id for bank/usdt destinations
Backend: Withdrawal approval with source_account_id succeeds
Backend: Proof upload for withdrawal transactions
Backend: GET /api/transactions/pending returns pending transactions
Backend: Filter transactions by type (deposit/withdrawal)
Backend: Pending transactions include client bank details
Backend: Pending transactions include client USDT details
Backend: GET /api/settlements/pending returns pending settlements
Backend: POST /api/transactions/{id}/approve?source_account_id works
Frontend: Approvals page has Filter by Type dropdown (All Types, Deposit, Withdrawal, Transfer)
Frontend: Approvals page has Filter by Destination dropdown (All Destinations, Treasury, Client Bank, USDT, PSP, Vendor)
Frontend: Approvals page has Search client input
Frontend: Approvals page Clear Filters button appears when filters active
Frontend: Approvals page shows client bank details for bank withdrawals (Bank name, Account number, SWIFT, Currency)
Frontend: Approvals page shows client USDT details for USDT withdrawals (Address, Network badge ERC20/TRC20)
Frontend: Withdrawal approval dialog opens when clicking Approve on withdrawal
Frontend: Withdrawal approval dialog shows Source Account dropdown with treasury accounts
Frontend: Withdrawal approval dialog shows Proof of Payment upload section
Frontend: Withdrawal approval dialog Continue to Approve button disabled until source + proof selected
Frontend: Transaction form USDT in currency dropdown
Frontend: Transaction form Client Bank destination shows bank details form
Frontend: Transaction form shows Saved Bank Accounts dropdown for clients with saved banks
Frontend: Transaction form shows message about saving new bank to client profile
seed_data_creation: Test client 'TestBank ClientT1' created with saved bank account 'Test Bank Corp'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested and working: 1) Approvals page filters (Type, Destination, Client search) with Clear Filters button. 2) Withdrawal approval dialog requires source_account_id and proof screenshot - Continue button disabled until both selected. 3) Client bank accounts saved to profile via POST /api/clients/{id}/bank-accounts. 4) Saved bank accounts dropdown appears in Transaction form when client has saved banks. 5) USDT in currency dropdown. 6) Pending transactions show bank/USDT details for withdrawals.

approvals_page_filters.type_filter: Working - All Types, Deposit, Withdrawal, Transfer
approvals_page_filters.destination_filter: Working - All Destinations, Treasury, Client Bank, USDT, PSP, Vendor

withdrawal_approval_dialog.opens_for_withdrawals: Working - Opens when clicking Approve on withdrawal tx
withdrawal_approval_dialog.source_account_selector: Working - Lists treasury/USDT accounts with balances
withdrawal_approval_dialog.proof_upload_section: Working - Choose File button to upload screenshot
withdrawal_approval_dialog.continue_button_validation: Working - Disabled until source + proof selected

client_bank_accounts.saved_banks_dropdown: Working - Shows in Transaction form for clients with saved banks
client_bank_accounts.auto_save_message: Working - Shows message about saving new bank to profile

usdt_currency.in_dropdown: Working - USDT option present in Payment Currency dropdown
usdt_currency.full_currency_list: USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, INR, JPY, USDT
